name: OT Asset Register
description: Comprehensive inventory of all OT hardware, software, and firmware. Minimum fields: asset ID, make/model, firmware/software version, IP/MAC, zone, owner, criticality.
format: Spreadsheet / CMDB export / Asset management tool

name: Zone and Conduit Architecture Diagram
description: Network topology diagram showing all zones, zone boundaries, conduits, inter-zone data flows, and SL-T per zone.

name: Security Level Assessment Report
description: Assessment of current SL-A (achieved) per zone against SL-T (target), based on evaluation of all 51 IEC 62443-3-3 SRs. Gap analysis and remediation roadmap.

name: OT Cyber Security Risk Assessment
description: IEC 62443-3-2 compliant risk assessment covering: asset inventory, zone definition, threat analysis, consequence assessment, SL-T setting, and risk treatment plan.
format: PDF report with supporting data — version controlled

name: OT Incident Response Plan
description: OT-specific incident response plan including system runbooks, NACSA notification procedure, evidence preservation guide, and operations engineering coordination protocol.

name: NACSA Incident Notification Template
description: Pre-populated template for NACSA s26 initial notification (within 6 hours), 72-hour follow-up, and 30-day final report.

name: Vendor Remote Access Log
description: Log of all third-party remote access sessions: vendor name, personnel, date/time, duration, systems accessed, work performed, approver.
format: Spreadsheet / Ticketing system / Access management tool

name: OT Backup Register and Test Records
description: Register of all OT backup configurations: system, backup type, schedule, storage location, last successful backup, last restore test, RTO target.

name: OT Change Management Log
description: Record of all OT system changes: change request ID, description, approver, implementation date, post-change verification result, rollback status.

name: SIS Program Checksum Register
description: Register of approved SIS program checksums/hashes per controller, established at commissioning or after each approved change. Used for integrity verification.
format: Hardcopy in secure storage + electronic in access-controlled system

name: SIS Modification Log
description: Physical logbook and electronic record of all SIS modification activities: date, who, what work, pre-work program hash, post-work program hash, two-person sign-off.

name: OT Vulnerability Register
description: Register of known vulnerabilities per OT asset: CVE, CVSS score, applicability, patch status, compensating control, risk acceptance, target remediation date.

name: OT Cybersecurity Policy
description: Board-approved OT cybersecurity policy covering: scope, objectives, roles/responsibilities, compliance requirements (IEC 62443, NACSA Act 854), and review schedule.

name: OT Network Baseline Documentation
description: Documented expected communication patterns per zone: normal source/destination pairs, protocols, ports, frequency. Used as baseline for anomaly detection.

name: OT Asset Commissioning Security Checklist
description: Checklist completed at commissioning of each new OT asset: default credentials changed, unused services disabled, network zone confirmed, backup taken, asset register updated.
format: Checklist form — signed off by commissioning engineer and OT security

name: OT RBAC Role Definitions and User-Role Assignment
description: Document defining OT access roles (Operator, Engineer, SCADA Admin, Vendor, Security Admin), the access rights associated with each role per OT system, and the current user-to-role assignment. Reviewed quarterly for privileged roles and annually for all roles.

name: PAM Deployment Architecture and Configuration
description: Architecture document describing the Privileged Access Management solution for OT: PAM tool, vaulted credential register (account names only — not passwords), session recording policy, and connection to OT targets. Break-glass procedure referenced.

name: Break-Glass Emergency Access Procedure
description: Documented emergency access procedure for OT systems when normal authentication is unavailable: sealed envelope credentials, cabinet access log, two-person approval, mandatory post-use review, and credential rotation. Separate SIS break-glass procedure with safety manager approval.
format: Controlled procedure document (physical + electronic) — restricted distribution

name: OT Removable Media Policy and Scanning Workstation Evidence
description: Policy governing removable media and external devices in OT: USB whitelist, scanning workstation procedure, vendor laptop policy, and exception process. Technical evidence includes USB port lockdown configuration and scanning workstation maintenance records.

name: OT Log Retention Policy and NACSA s26 Compliance Evidence
description: Tiered log retention policy (90 days SIEM / 1 year archive / 7 years immutable for incident-related logs) with WORM storage configuration evidence and annual compliance audit records. Demonstrates compliance with NACSA s26(6) 7-year record-keeping obligation.
format: Policy document + WORM storage configuration + annual audit records

name: OT Threat Hunting Programme and Exercise Reports
description: Quarterly threat hunt exercise reports: hypothesis, MITRE ATT&CK for ICS technique targeted, data sources searched, findings, outcome, and SIEM rule updates from hunt results. MITRE technique coverage map showing which ICS techniques are actively hunted.
format: Report per exercise (PDF) + technique coverage map (spreadsheet)

name: OT RTO/RPO Register and Annual Test Records
description: Register of Recovery Time Objective (RTO) and Recovery Point Objective (RPO) per OT system, tiered by operational criticality. Operations engineering sign-off on RTO targets (including plant reconstitution time). Annual RTO test results documenting actual vs target.

name: OT Backup Integrity Hash Records
description: SHA-256 hash records for all OT system backups, stored separately from backup media. SIS program checksum register (physical + electronic). Quarterly restore test records including hash verification result. Demonstrates integrity verification per BR-R3 and SR-3.4.
format: Hash record database/spreadsheet + SIS physical register + quarterly test records

name: OT Personnel Security Records
description: OT security awareness training completion records for OT personnel and SOC analysts. Background screening policy and status (individual records redacted). Joiners/movers/leavers OT access removal log demonstrating timely removal of access on departure.
format: Training completion register (LMS export) + access removal log + screening policy

name: OT/SOC Interface Agreement and Playbooks
description: Agreement defining SOC responsibilities for OT events: escalation path (SOC L1 → OT security lead → OT operations manager → NACSA notification coordinator), and constraint (SOC does not take active response actions in OT without operations approval). OT-specific SOC playbooks per alert type.
format: Controlled document (PDF/Word) + playbook set per alert type

name: OT Vendor Security Assessment Records
description: Security assessment records for OT component vendors and service providers: vendor questionnaire responses, contractual OT security obligations, remote access policy sign-off, and annual vendor access reviews. Evidence for supply chain security requirements.
format: Vendor assessment form (per vendor) + contractual clause evidence + annual review records

name: OT Session Management Configuration Evidence
description: Configuration evidence for OT session timeout policy: engineering workstation timeout settings (15 min), PAM remote session timeout and termination configuration, HMI session settings with operations engineering sign-off, and concurrent session limit configuration.
format: Configuration screenshots or exports + operations engineering sign-off

name: OT Personnel Access Register
description: Register of all personnel with access to OT systems: name, role, access rights per system, access method, date of last access review, and date of last background screening. Reviewed quarterly against HR records.
